arcs.title: The Northern Descent
arcs.summary: New arc opening quietly: at the ridgeline, Steve was already looking at the northern descent before they left. It is not on any current trail map — Orvell said only 'it goes somewhere' before departing. The enchanted survey charts list the northern face as 'Unverified (Seasonal),' which is different from 'Disputed (Atmospheric)' in ways that neither Christine nor Steve has yet worked out. Day 2 should cover the first look at what 'Unverified (Seasonal)' actually means, and whether the brass duck pair on the shelf has any bearing on it.
